name: Tabbouleh
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the wheat in warm water for 20 minutes. Drain thoroughly and squeeze dry.
2. Add the onion, parsley, and half of the olives (quartered) to the wheat.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the oil and lemon juice and season to taste.
4. Mix the olive oil and lemon mixture into the wheat.
5. Transfer the mixture to a flat serving dish and top with the remaining tomatoes (quartered) and the rest of the olives (halved).
6. Freshly ground pepper may be added to taste. Optionally, mint can also be added either in place of parsley or alongside it.
